pass_criteria: An AI governance policy document exists and is referenced from the repository root.
partial_criteria: A governance policy exists but is incomplete or not linked from the repository root.
missing_criteria: No governance policy document found in the repository.

pass_criteria: Roles and responsibilities for AI oversight are clearly defined and documented.
partial_criteria: Some roles are defined but oversight responsibilities are incomplete.
missing_criteria: No documentation of AI oversight roles and responsibilities found.

pass_criteria: A documented AI risk assessment is present, identifying key risks and their mitigations.
partial_criteria: A risk assessment exists but does not cover all identified AI-specific risks.
missing_criteria: No AI risk assessment document found in the repository.

pass_criteria: A risk register or risk tracking artefact is present and up to date.
partial_criteria: A risk register exists but lacks status tracking or owner assignments.
missing_criteria: No risk register found in the repository.

pass_criteria: An accountability framework document assigns clear ownership of AI decisions.
partial_criteria: Accountability is partially documented but decision owners are not all named.
missing_criteria: No accountability framework found in the repository.

pass_criteria: An incident response plan specific to AI failures is documented.
partial_criteria: A generic incident response plan exists but does not address AI-specific failures.
missing_criteria: No incident response documentation found in the repository.

pass_criteria: Approval and sign-off processes for AI system changes are documented.
partial_criteria: Some change approval steps are documented but the process is incomplete.
missing_criteria: No change approval or sign-off process documented.

pass_criteria: An internal audit schedule or evidence of periodic AI system reviews is present.
partial_criteria: Audit activity is referenced but no schedule or cadence is specified.
missing_criteria: No internal audit documentation found in the repository.

pass_criteria: Third-party supplier and subprocessor governance obligations are documented.
partial_criteria: Third-party obligations are partially addressed but key requirements are missing.
missing_criteria: No third-party governance documentation found.

pass_criteria: A decommission or end-of-life plan for the AI system is documented.
partial_criteria: Decommission considerations are mentioned but a formal plan is absent.
missing_criteria: No decommission or end-of-life plan found.

pass_criteria: An explainability approach is documented, describing how AI decisions can be explained.
partial_criteria: Explainability is mentioned but the approach is not fully specified.
missing_criteria: No explainability documentation found in the repository.

pass_criteria: Model interpretability methods (e.g. SHAP, LIME, attention maps) are referenced or implemented.
partial_criteria: Interpretability is referenced but no specific methods or tooling are documented.
missing_criteria: No model interpretability approach found.

pass_criteria: AI disclosure notice is present, informing end users that they are interacting with an AI system.
partial_criteria: AI disclosure exists but is incomplete or not prominently displayed.
missing_criteria: No AI disclosure notice found in the repository.

pass_criteria: Output uncertainty or confidence levels are communicated to users in the system.
partial_criteria: Uncertainty communication is partially implemented.
missing_criteria: No output uncertainty communication documented or implemented.

pass_criteria: Decision logging is implemented, recording AI outputs and the inputs that drove them.
partial_criteria: Some decision logging exists but coverage is incomplete.
missing_criteria: No decision logging found in the repository.

pass_criteria: Audit trail documentation describes what is logged, retention periods, and access controls.
partial_criteria: Audit trail documentation exists but is missing retention or access control details.
missing_criteria: No audit trail documentation found.

pass_criteria: User notification mechanisms are implemented to inform users of AI system limitations.
partial_criteria: Notification mechanisms exist but do not cover all key limitations.
missing_criteria: No user notification mechanism documented.

pass_criteria: Version transparency is implemented — the AI model version is reported alongside outputs.
partial_criteria: Version information is available but not consistently surfaced to users.
missing_criteria: No version transparency mechanism found.

pass_criteria: Bias testing documentation or tooling is present, covering at least one protected characteristic.
partial_criteria: Bias testing is referenced but methodology or results are not fully documented.
missing_criteria: No bias testing documentation or tooling found.

pass_criteria: Bias mitigation techniques are documented and applied to training or inference.
partial_criteria: Bias mitigation is referenced but implementation details are incomplete.
missing_criteria: No bias mitigation documentation found.

pass_criteria: Demographic parity or similar group fairness metric is measured and reported.
partial_criteria: Fairness metrics are measured but results are not reported or documented.
missing_criteria: No demographic parity or group fairness metric found.

pass_criteria: Equalized odds or equal opportunity metrics are present in the evaluation pipeline.
partial_criteria: Some individual-fairness metric is present but equalized odds is not evaluated.
missing_criteria: No equalized odds or individual-fairness metric found.

pass_criteria: A fairness evaluation report is present, summarising metrics across protected groups.
partial_criteria: A fairness report exists but does not cover all protected groups.
missing_criteria: No fairness evaluation report found.

pass_criteria: An anti-discrimination policy for AI outputs is documented.
partial_criteria: Non-discrimination principles are mentioned but a formal policy is absent.
missing_criteria: No anti-discrimination policy found in the repository.

pass_criteria: Handling of protected attributes (race, gender, age, etc.) is documented in the data and model pipeline.
partial_criteria: Protected attributes are mentioned but handling procedures are not fully specified.
missing_criteria: No documentation on protected attribute handling found.

pass_criteria: A privacy impact assessment (PIA) document is present and references data processing activities.
partial_criteria: A PIA document exists but does not reference all data processing activities.
missing_criteria: No privacy impact assessment found in the repository.

pass_criteria: A consent mechanism for data collection is documented and implemented.
partial_criteria: Consent is mentioned but the mechanism or implementation is incomplete.
missing_criteria: No consent mechanism documented.

pass_criteria: Data minimisation principles are documented and applied — only necessary data is collected.
partial_criteria: Data minimisation is referenced but not fully applied across all data flows.
missing_criteria: No data minimisation documentation found.

pass_criteria: A data retention policy with defined periods and deletion procedures is documented.
partial_criteria: Retention periods are specified but deletion procedures are incomplete.
missing_criteria: No data retention policy found in the repository.

pass_criteria: Right-to-erasure (right to be forgotten) procedures are documented.
partial_criteria: Right to erasure is acknowledged but procedures are not fully specified.
missing_criteria: No right-to-erasure procedure documented.

pass_criteria: PII masking or redaction is implemented in code — no raw PII logged or stored in plain text.
partial_criteria: Some PII masking is present but not consistently applied across all logging paths.
missing_criteria: No PII masking or redaction found in the codebase.

pass_criteria: Data anonymisation or pseudonymisation techniques are documented and applied.
partial_criteria: Anonymisation is referenced but implementation details are absent.
missing_criteria: No anonymisation or pseudonymisation documentation found.

pass_criteria: Third-party data sharing agreements and controls are documented.
partial_criteria: Third-party data sharing is acknowledged but controls are not fully specified.
missing_criteria: No third-party data sharing documentation found.

pass_criteria: A threat model for the AI system is documented, identifying attack vectors and mitigations.
partial_criteria: A threat model exists but does not cover AI-specific vectors (e.g. prompt injection, data poisoning).
missing_criteria: No threat model found in the repository.

pass_criteria: Adversarial robustness testing (e.g. adversarial examples, prompt injection tests) is documented.
partial_criteria: Adversarial testing is referenced but results or methodology are not documented.
missing_criteria: No adversarial robustness testing found.

pass_criteria: Dependency management is in place — a lockfile or pinned dependency manifest is present.
partial_criteria: Dependencies are partially pinned but a full lockfile is absent.
missing_criteria: No dependency lockfile or pinned manifest found.

pass_criteria: Automated vulnerability scanning of dependencies is configured (e.g. Dependabot, Snyk, pip-audit).
partial_criteria: Vulnerability scanning tooling is referenced but not fully configured.
missing_criteria: No dependency vulnerability scanning configured.

pass_criteria: Access controls for AI model artefacts and training data are documented and enforced.
partial_criteria: Access controls exist but coverage of all sensitive assets is incomplete.
missing_criteria: No access control documentation found for AI artefacts.

pass_criteria: Secrets management is in place — no credentials, API keys, or tokens are committed to the repository.
partial_criteria: Most secrets are managed but at least one hardcoded credential was detected.
missing_criteria: Hardcoded credentials or secrets found in the repository.

pass_criteria: Input validation is implemented for all external inputs to the AI pipeline.
partial_criteria: Input validation is partially implemented — not all entry points are covered.
missing_criteria: No input validation found in the AI pipeline codebase.

pass_criteria: Security testing (SAST, DAST, or penetration testing) evidence is documented.
partial_criteria: Security testing is referenced but results or tooling configuration are absent.
missing_criteria: No security testing documentation found.

pass_criteria: A human override or intervention mechanism is documented and implementable for AI decisions.
partial_criteria: Human override is referenced but implementation details are incomplete.
missing_criteria: No human override mechanism documented.

pass_criteria: A monitoring dashboard or equivalent real-time visibility tool for AI system behaviour is present.
partial_criteria: Monitoring tooling exists but real-time AI behaviour visibility is limited.
missing_criteria: No AI monitoring dashboard or visibility tool found.

pass_criteria: Escalation procedures for anomalous AI behaviour are documented with defined thresholds.
partial_criteria: Escalation is mentioned but thresholds or owners are not specified.
missing_criteria: No escalation procedures documented.

pass_criteria: Human-in-the-loop (HITL) checkpoints are defined and integrated into the AI workflow.
partial_criteria: HITL is referenced but checkpoint definitions or integration are incomplete.
missing_criteria: No human-in-the-loop mechanism documented.

pass_criteria: Performance monitoring configuration is present, tracking key AI quality metrics over time.
partial_criteria: Performance monitoring exists but key AI-specific metrics are not tracked.
missing_criteria: No performance monitoring configuration found.

pass_criteria: Alerting mechanisms are configured to notify human operators of AI system anomalies.
partial_criteria: Alerting is configured but thresholds or notification channels are missing.
missing_criteria: No alerting mechanism found for AI anomaly detection.

pass_criteria: A documented review cadence (e.g. quarterly) for AI system performance and behaviour is in place.
partial_criteria: Reviews are mentioned but frequency or responsibility is not defined.
missing_criteria: No documented AI review cadence found.

pass_criteria: Safe failure modes are documented — the system falls back safely when errors or anomalies occur.
partial_criteria: Fallback is partially documented but not all failure scenarios are covered.
missing_criteria: No safe failure mode documentation found.

pass_criteria: Fallback mechanisms (e.g. rule-based defaults, human handoff) are implemented for AI failures.
partial_criteria: Fallback mechanisms are referenced but implementation is incomplete.
missing_criteria: No fallback mechanism documented or implemented.

pass_criteria: A hazard identification exercise has been conducted and its findings are documented.
partial_criteria: Hazard identification is referenced but findings are not fully recorded.
missing_criteria: No hazard identification documentation found.

pass_criteria: Safety testing evidence is present, including test cases for unsafe output scenarios.
partial_criteria: Safety testing is referenced but test coverage of unsafe scenarios is incomplete.
missing_criteria: No safety testing evidence found in the repository.

pass_criteria: Harm prevention controls (e.g. output filtering, content moderation) are documented.
partial_criteria: Harm prevention is partially documented — not all output channels are covered.
missing_criteria: No harm prevention controls documented.

pass_criteria: Safety validation results are recorded and signed off before system deployment.
partial_criteria: Safety validation results exist but are not formally signed off.
missing_criteria: No safety validation documentation found.

pass_criteria: Compute efficiency measures are documented — model size, hardware utilisation, or batching strategies described.
partial_criteria: Compute efficiency is mentioned but no specific measures or metrics are documented.
missing_criteria: No compute efficiency documentation found.

pass_criteria: Carbon tracking or energy consumption measurement for training/inference is documented.
partial_criteria: Carbon impact is acknowledged but no measurements or tracking tooling is referenced.
missing_criteria: No carbon tracking or energy measurement documentation found.

pass_criteria: An energy consumption report for the AI system is produced and available in the repository.
partial_criteria: Energy usage is estimated but a formal report has not been produced.
missing_criteria: No energy consumption report found.

pass_criteria: A model card or system card is present with all mandatory fields (purpose, limitations, intended use).
partial_criteria: A model card is present but missing one or more mandatory fields.
missing_criteria: No model card or system card found in the repository.

pass_criteria: An architecture decision record (ADR) or equivalent technical documentation describes AI component design choices.
partial_criteria: Technical documentation exists but does not cover key AI design decisions.
missing_criteria: No architectural documentation for AI components found.

pass_criteria: A version manifest listing model versions, dataset versions, and library versions is present.
partial_criteria: A version manifest exists but is missing model or dataset version information.
missing_criteria: No version manifest found in the repository.

pass_criteria: A changelog or release notes document tracks AI system changes over time.
partial_criteria: A changelog exists but does not document AI model or behaviour changes.
missing_criteria: No changelog or release notes found.

pass_criteria: Audit log documentation describes what events are logged, retention periods, and access controls.
partial_criteria: Audit logging is implemented but documentation is incomplete.
missing_criteria: No audit log documentation found.

pass_criteria: WORM (Write-Once-Read-Many) or append-only audit store compliance is documented.
partial_criteria: Append-only logging is referenced but WORM compliance documentation is absent.
missing_criteria: No WORM or append-only audit store documentation found.

pass_criteria: All AI framework and library dependencies are documented with versions and licence information.
partial_criteria: Dependencies are listed but version or licence information is incomplete.
missing_criteria: No dependency documentation found.

pass_criteria: Training data documentation (data card or dataset README) is present in the repository.
partial_criteria: Training data is referenced but a formal data card is absent.
missing_criteria: No training data documentation found.

pass_criteria: WCAG 2.1 AA compliance is documented for all user-facing AI interfaces.
partial_criteria: WCAG compliance is referenced but not all interface components are covered.
missing_criteria: No WCAG compliance documentation found.

pass_criteria: Alternative text (alt text) is provided for all AI-generated images and non-text content.
partial_criteria: Alt text is partially implemented — some images lack descriptions.
missing_criteria: No alt text implementation documented.

pass_criteria: Keyboard navigation is fully supported in all user-facing AI components.
partial_criteria: Keyboard navigation is partially implemented — some components are not keyboard-accessible.
missing_criteria: No keyboard navigation support documented.

pass_criteria: Colour contrast ratios meet WCAG 2.1 AA standards across all AI interface elements.
partial_criteria: Colour contrast is partially compliant — some elements fall below required ratios.
missing_criteria: No colour contrast compliance documentation found.

pass_criteria: Multi-language or localisation support is documented for user-facing AI outputs.
partial_criteria: Language support is partially documented — not all target languages are covered.
missing_criteria: No multi-language or localisation documentation found.

pass_criteria: Human-factors hazards (cognitive load, automation bias) are identified and mitigated in the UX design.
partial_criteria: Human-factors hazards are acknowledged but mitigations are not fully specified.
missing_criteria: No human-factors hazard documentation found.

pass_criteria: Accessibility testing evidence is present, including test results with assistive technologies.
partial_criteria: Accessibility testing is referenced but results or scope are not documented.
missing_criteria: No accessibility testing evidence found.

pass_criteria: Data provenance documentation traces the origin and collection method of all training datasets.
partial_criteria: Provenance is partially documented — some datasets lack origin information.
missing_criteria: No data provenance documentation found.

pass_criteria: Data lineage is tracked — transformations, preprocessing steps, and data flows are documented.
partial_criteria: Some lineage information is present but transformations are not fully documented.
missing_criteria: No data lineage documentation found.

pass_criteria: Labelling quality documentation is present, including annotation guidelines and inter-annotator agreement.
partial_criteria: Labelling is documented but annotation guidelines or agreement metrics are absent.
missing_criteria: No labelling quality documentation found.

pass_criteria: Data drift detection is implemented and monitoring configuration is present.
partial_criteria: Drift detection is referenced but monitoring configuration is not in place.
missing_criteria: No data drift detection found.

pass_criteria: Data validation checks (schema validation, range checks, completeness checks) are implemented.
partial_criteria: Data validation is partially implemented — not all fields or datasets are covered.
missing_criteria: No data validation checks found.

pass_criteria: Data quality metrics (completeness, accuracy, consistency) are measured and reported.
partial_criteria: Some data quality metrics are tracked but not all dimensions are covered.
missing_criteria: No data quality metrics found.
